projects.title: E-commerce platform modernization for Staples
projects.problem: Staples' checkout process was slow, outdated, and inaccessible—customers were spending 2-4 extra minutes per transaction. Development teams across 5 different sites had no shared design system, leading to inconsistent user experiences and duplicated work.
projects.contribution: I led the frontend implementation and migration of the cart and checkout experience from Create React App to Next.js, improving performance and accessibility. I also owned the build tooling for the company's new Design System library, integrating Rollup and SWC.js for optimized bundling and configuring the CI/CD pipeline for package distribution across teams.
